candidates.why: Supplemental debt maturity line that may include current portion of long-term debt, but may also overlap with lease-related amounts and is less clean than the current non-lease financial liabilities component.
Current financial liabilities excluding the separately disclosed lease liabilities; best match to short-term debt excluding leases.
Current financial liabilities total, but includes lease liabilities and should be avoided for baseline STD.
Lease liabilities are explicitly excluded from baseline STD.

variables.notes: OK. Chose a non-shortlist row because it appears to be the current financial liabilities component excluding the separately disclosed 'Finance lease liabilities', which fits baseline STD best and avoids lease inclusion.
